languages.text: "А кто-то кроме Батошски может дать присягу? Например, ты?"
"Can anyone other than Batoshski swear the oath? You, perhaps?"
languages.original_text: "А кто-то кроме Батошски может дать присягу? Например, ты?"

traits.locale_text: "Can anyone other than Batoshski swear the oath? You, perhaps?"
"Can anyone other than Batoshski swear the oath? You, perhaps?"
"Understood, Captain-Quartermaster. Let's see if I can win out over his paranoia and earn his respect."
"Can anyone other than Batoshski swear the oath? You, perhaps?"
"Can anyone other than Batoshski swear the oath? You, perhaps?"
"Can anyone other than Batoshski swear the oath? You, perhaps?"

languages.text: 「わかった、艦長兼軍需官。彼の被害妄想に打ち勝って、敬意を勝ち取れるか試してみよう」
languages.original_text: "Understood, Captain-Quartermaster. Let's see if I can win out over his paranoia and earn his respect."

traits.locale_text: 了解しました、艦長兼軍需官。彼の被害妄想に打ち勝って、敬意を勝ち取れるか試してみましょう。

languages.text: « Qui d'autre que Batoshski pourrait prêter serment ? Vous, peut-être ? »
languages.original_text: "Can anyone other than Batoshski swear the oath? You, perhaps?"

traits.locale_text: « Qui d'autre que Batoshski pourrait prêter serment ? Vous, peut-être ? »

languages.text: "Batoshski'den başka yemin edebilecek kimse var mı? Mesela sen?"
languages.original_text: "Can anyone other than Batoshski swear the oath? You, perhaps?"

traits.locale_text: "Batoshski'den başka yemin edebilecek kimse var mı? Mesela sen?"

languages.text: "Kann den Eid außer Batoshski noch jemand ablegen? Ihr vielleicht?"
languages.original_text: "Can anyone other than Batoshski swear the oath? You, perhaps?"

traits.locale_text: "Kann den Eid außer Batoshski noch jemand ablegen? Ihr vielleicht?"

languages.text: «¿Hay alguien más capacitado para prestar el juramento, aparte de Batoshski? ¿Usted misma, por ejemplo?».
languages.original_text: "Can anyone other than Batoshski swear the oath? You, perhaps?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Hay alguien más capacitado para prestar el juramento, aparte de Batoshski? ¿Usted misma, por ejemplo?».

languages.text: “除了巴托什斯基，还有别人能宣誓吗？也许你行？”
languages.original_text: "Can anyone other than Batoshski swear the oath? You, perhaps?"

traits.locale_text: “除了巴托什斯基，还有别人能宣誓吗？也许你行？”
